title: Reporting allocations
description: Schema for shared/reporting_allocations.csv. Reporting allocations map role activity to external accounting labels without defining physical topology or coverage obligations.

role_id.description: Role whose activity is allocated. Validation must resolve this role_id against shared/roles.csv.

allocation_basis.description: Basis used to allocate role activity.

allocation_share.description: Share of role activity allocated to this reporting row. Shares for a role within a reporting system must resolve to full reporting coverage.
